title.en: Ye Tian urged his Peak Master Order and left th...

content.en:
Ye Tian didn't need to practice the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique in the Land of Inheritance, because it would take a long time to cultivate the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, and the examiner could slowly cultivate after going out, and when he practiced the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, he could become a reserve peak master through the Peak Master Token.

At that time, the Peak Master Token will also be completely fused with Ye Tian, and Ye Tian's authority in Black Wind Mountain will also be upgraded to the Reserve Peak Master level.

The Reserve Peak Master will also use the Peak Master Token and consciousness to directly arrive at the place of inheritance, and obtain the inheritance and benefits belonging to the Reserve Peak Master.

"Get out of here!"

Ye Tian urged his Peak Master Order and left the Land of Inheritance.

As for Longhai Zhenjun, Ye Tian didn't care about him.

After all, if Longhai Zhenjun hadn't practiced the sixth technique of the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging, it was estimated that he would not leave the place of inheritance and would have stayed there forever.

And he couldn't waste time waiting for Longhai Zhenjun, so he could only leave Longhai Zhenjun in the land of inheritance in Black Wind Mountain.

------------

Ye Tian was not in a hurry to cultivate the Black Wind Domain Realm Technique, after all, there was a lot of time in the future, and he should hurry up to find treasures and opportunities now.

There are countless opportunities and treasures on the battlefield relics, and if you find a true ancestor corpse at random, it will be an amazing harvest!

If you are lucky and find a corpse of Dao Ancestor, it is very likely that you will get the full net worth of Dao Ancestor.

Of course, it is also possible to find the corpse of a Dao Ancestor who has been robbed of treasures.

But even if there are no treasures, a Dao Ancestor corpse is of great value.

The battlefield ruins were very large, but there were also a lot of True Monarchs pouring in, so Ye Tian encountered some True Monarchs from time to time.

But Ye Tiannai was the number one powerhouse on the True Monarch List, and no one dared to provoke him, so he was very calm along the way, and he hardly encountered any trouble.

There are many ruins of the battlefield, and you can often see corpses, which shows the tragedy of the original war.

In a few months, Ye Tian harvested a lot of resource treasures, and even found a few corpses of True Ancestors, but it was a pity that only one True Ancestor corpse had storage treasures on it, and the other True Ancestor corpses had no treasures at all.

In addition, Ye Tian also harvested a large number of weapon fragments, a single weapon fragment is not worth much, but countless weapon fragments are of high value, and throwing them to the human race is enough to make the human race's heritage rise greatly.

However, Ye Tian was a little sorry that he had not yet found a real treasure land, such as a treasure or chance involving the level of Dao Ancestor.

And he heard that some True Monarchs had found the Dao Ancestor's dojo and the inheritance of the Dao Ancestor.

The message was supposed to be true, but he didn't find a specific location.

After all, who would reveal such a place of chance!

Hundreds of millions of True Monarchs poured into the battlefield ruins, but there were definitely only a few or dozens of True Monarchs who really found the opportunity involving the Dao Ancestor level, which was completely a matter of luck, and the probability was too low.

Although Ye Tian felt that his luck was good, if he relied purely on luck, he would naturally not feel that he was really a child of destiny, and he would casually find the opportunity of Dao Ancestor's grade.

It's a pity that after entering the battlefield ruins, it is impossible for the true monarchs of the Void Heaven Temple to share information with him, and if he really encounters benefits, which one will share the benefits with others?

Therefore, Ye Tian can only rely on himself to find opportunities.

this day.

Ye Tian was flying, and suddenly felt a strong battle fluctuation, and it was not one of two True Monarchs fighting, but a group of True Monarchs fighting.

"Let's see!"

Ye Tian flew over quickly, and soon came to the place of battle.

Thundered!!!!

A powerful True Monarch was fighting, and there was a group of True Monarchs hidden around, all of whom were injured a lot, but none of them left here.

There is obviously a great opportunity to be able to risk their lives to stay here.

I saw that these true monarchs were staring at a forbidden area in the distance.

There, there was a spatial rift, and behind the rift was a medicine garden.

There are miracle medicines growing in the medicine garden, and the years of these miracle medicines are at least hundreds of millions of years, or even billions of years.

You must know that many elixirs cannot grow for hundreds of millions of years at all, and even if they are cultivated for tens of trillions of years, they can only be counted as elixirs for tens of millions of years.

However, the miracle medicines in these medicine gardens have hundreds of millions of years and billions of years, which shows that these magic medicines are not medicinal materials, but extremely precious species, and their value is difficult to estimate.

A strain of such a divine medicine is worth fighting for the true monarchs, not to mention such a garden of divine medicine, once you get so many divine medicines, you will not have to worry about your cultivation in the future, even if the weak true monarchs have a certain degree of certainty to be promoted to the true monarch list, and even become a true ancestor, and even a true ancestor in the middle or even late stage of the Great Dao.

Because of this, these true monarchs are so crazy, constantly fighting, and they all want to occupy this medicine garden alone.

"Here it is...... Dojo!"

Ye Tian was stunned.

This medicine garden is not a natural medicine garden, but a medicine garden of a dojo.

The dojo is the exclusive cultivation place opened up by the Dao Ancestor, and it is his own home for the Dao Ancestor, for example, in the Void Heaven Realm, there is also the Dojo of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

Dao Ancestor attaches great importance to the dojo, and the formation prohibition arranged by the Dao Ancestor and the level of Dao Ancestor do not want to break it easily, and Dao Ancestor has been operating his own dojo for countless years, and the strength he has exerted in the dojo is stronger than the outside world.

None of the Dao Ancestors was willing to fight the other party in the opponent's dojo, in that case, it would be easy to be killed by the slightly weaker Dao Ancestor.

Every Dao Ancestor's dojo is different, some dojos are empty, there is nothing, just endless formation prohibitions, and simple buildings.

Some dojos, on the other hand, have a complete ecosystem, like a small world.

And some dojos are like farmland, a wooden house, an acre of fertile land, like a paradise.

The dojo that appeared in front of Ye Tian, that Dao Ancestor opened up a medicine garden in it, and planted a variety of rare medicinal materials in it, and now it has grown into a magic medicine that has been hundreds of millions or even billions of years old.

This is just the corner of the dojo, maybe there are still the treasures of the Dao Ancestor and the inheritance of the Dao Ancestor inside.

In general, the complete dojo cannot be entered by the True Monarchs or even the True Ancestors, but the dojo in front of him has been torn out of a corner, which means that this dojo can enter it.

One can imagine how valuable this dojo is.

Ye Tian had to admit that he was very moved, and he couldn't wait to occupy this dojo immediately.
